# GitHub Directory

This folder contains GitHub-specific repository automation and workflow configuration.

## Contents

- GitHub Actions workflows
- CI and deployment automation
- repository policy support files

## Rules

- Keep workflows readable and modular.
- Avoid large inline scripts in workflow YAML.
- Prefer reusable scripts from scripts/.
- Validate workflow syntax before committing.
- Keep deployment logic documented.
- Remove unused workflows and stale references.
